'''tapubu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:oecumenicalism|oecumenicalism]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| t-p-b
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:oecumenicalism|oecumenicalism]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| tapubu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:tæpibith|tæpibith]] || [[word:tæpibij|tæpibij]] || [[word:tæpibish|tæpibish]] || [[word:tæpibi|tæpibi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:tapupubuth|tapupubuth]] || [[word:tapupubuj|tapupubuj]] || [[word:tapupubush|tapupubush]] || [[word:tapupubu|tapupubu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:tapubuth|tapubuth]] || [[word:tapubuj|tapubuj]] || [[word:tapubush|tapubush]] || [[word:tapubu|tapubu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:tapufbuth|tapufbuth]] || [[word:tapufbuj|tapufbuj]] || [[word:tapufbush|tapufbush]] || [[word:tapufbuf|tapufbuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:tapubuthu|tapubuthu]] || [[word:tapubuju|tapubuju]] || [[word:tapubushu|tapubushu]] || [[word:tapubuku|tapubuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:tapubuth|tapubuth]] || [[word:tapubuj|tapubuj]] || [[word:tapubush|tapubush]] || [[word:tapubu|tapubu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:tapubuthul|tapubuthul]] || [[word:tapubujul|tapubujul]] || [[word:tapubushul|tapubushul]] || [[word:tapubukul|tapubukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:tapubuthuthu|tapubuthuthu]] || [[word:tapubujuju|tapubujuju]] || [[word:tapubushushu|tapubushushu]] || [[word:tapubuku|tapubuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:tapubuthun|tapubuthun]] || [[word:tapubujun|tapubujun]] || [[word:tapubushun|tapubushun]] || [[word:tapubukun|tapubukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:tapubuthuoro|tapubuthuoro]] || [[word:tapubujuoro|tapubujuoro]] || [[word:tapubushuoro|tapubushuoro]] || [[word:tapubukuoro|tapubukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|0c4abda}}
